hooks.command: jq -c 'select((.tool_response // {} | tostring) | test("triggered")) | {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: "An OPNsense firmware update/upgrade was just triggered. Invoke the watch-update skill now: arm a Monitor with bash .claude/skills/watch-update/watch-update.sh (see .claude/skills/watch-update/SKILL.md for timeouts and event handling), then verify the final version when a terminal event arrives."}}' 2>/dev/null || true
